MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Woods appeared via zoom for Colin King (petitioner).

Mr. Woods stated that the property is on escrow and that he will be filing a status report early next year. The matter is continued to March 3, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
